ingredients.item:
LAMB AND BROTH
2 tablespoons vegetable oil
2 pounds (900 g) bone-in lamb shoulder, cut into 2- to 3-inch (5 to 7.5 cm) pieces (see Note)
ingredients.original:
LAMB AND BROTH
2 tablespoons vegetable oil
2 pounds (900 g) bone-in lamb shoulder, cut into 2- to 3-inch (5 to 7.5 cm) pieces (see Note)

ingredients.item: 2 cinnamon sticks
ingredients.original: 2 cinnamon sticks

ingredients.item: 5 green cardamom pods
ingredients.original: 5 green cardamom pods

ingredients.item: 6 whole allspice berries
ingredients.original: 6 whole allspice berries

ingredients.item: 6 whole cloves
ingredients.original: 6 whole cloves

ingredients.item: 3 bay leaves
ingredients.original: 3 bay leaves

ingredients.item: 3½ teaspoons kosher salt, divided
ingredients.original: 3½ teaspoons kosher salt, divided

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon black pepper
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon black pepper

ingredients.item: ¼ cup (60 g) tomato paste
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (60 g) tomato paste

ingredients.item: ½ cup (120 ml) plus 3 tablespoons olive oil, divided
ingredients.original: ½ cup (120 ml) plus 3 tablespoons olive oil, divided

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon kosher salt, divided
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon kosher salt, divided

ingredients.item: 2 small yellow onions, sliced ¼ inch (6 mm) thick
ingredients.original: 2 small yellow onions, sliced ¼ inch (6 mm) thick

ingredients.item: 1 medium red bell pepper, seeds removed and sliced ½ inch (13 mm) thick
ingredients.original: 1 medium red bell pepper, seeds removed and sliced ½ inch (13 mm) thick

ingredients.item: 1 large tomato, sliced ½ inch (13 mm) thick
ingredients.original: 1 large tomato, sliced ½ inch (13 mm) thick

ingredients.item: 18 ounces (510 g) canned chickpeas, drained and rinsed
ingredients.original: 18 ounces (510 g) canned chickpeas, drained and rinsed

ingredients.item: 2½ cups (500 g) long-grain white basmati rice, rinsed until the water runs clear and drained completely
ingredients.original: 2½ cups (500 g) long-grain white basmati rice, rinsed until the water runs clear and drained completely

ingredients.item:
FOR GARNISHING AND SERVING
2 teaspoons olive oil (optional)
¼ cup (30 g) slivered almonds (optional)
ingredients.original:
FOR GARNISHING AND SERVING
2 teaspoons olive oil (optional)
¼ cup (30 g) slivered almonds (optional)

ingredients.item: ¼ cup (13 g) finely chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (13 g) finely chopped fresh parsley

ingredients.item: 1 TO MAKE THE LAMB AND BROTH: In a pressure cooker or large pot, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat for 1 minute. Add the lamb pieces and sear for 2 to 3 minutes on each side, until lightly golden, working in batches to avoid overcrowding. Add 3 cups (720 ml) of water, the cinnamon sticks, cardamom pods, allspice berries, cloves, bay leaves, and 1 teaspoon of the salt. If using a pressure cooker, pressure-cook on high for 25 minutes; if using the stovetop, cover with the lid and boil over medium heat for 40 to 60 minutes, until the lamb is tender.
ingredients.original: 1 TO MAKE THE LAMB AND BROTH: In a pressure cooker or large pot, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat for 1 minute. Add the lamb pieces and sear for 2 to 3 minutes on each side, until lightly golden, working in batches to avoid overcrowding. Add 3 cups (720 ml) of water, the cinnamon sticks, cardamom pods, allspice berries, cloves, bay leaves, and 1 teaspoon of the salt. If using a pressure cooker, pressure-cook on high for 25 minutes; if using the stovetop, cover with the lid and boil over medium heat for 40 to 60 minutes, until the lamb is tender.

ingredients.item: 2 Once the lamb is cooked, transfer it to a plate. Strain the broth from the whole spices and pour it into a large bowl or a 6-cup (1.4 L) measuring cup. Add the turmeric, remaining 2½ teaspoons salt, 1 teaspoon black pepper, and tomato paste. Mix well to combine and add additional water to make 5½ cups (1.3 L) of liquid in total. Set aside.
ingredients.original: 2 Once the lamb is cooked, transfer it to a plate. Strain the broth from the whole spices and pour it into a large bowl or a 6-cup (1.4 L) measuring cup. Add the turmeric, remaining 2½ teaspoons salt, 1 teaspoon black pepper, and tomato paste. Mix well to combine and add additional water to make 5½ cups (1.3 L) of liquid in total. Set aside.
